hero.subtitle: A Frontend Developer dedicated to building

about.title: 01 / About
about.heading: Digital Architect
about.p1: With a background in Architectural Engineering, I bring a unique perspective to frontend development—viewing every interface as a structural challenge where form must follow function. My transition from physical to digital architecture was driven by a fascination with the speed and scalability of web technologies.
about.p2: I focus on writing maintainable code and building interfaces that feel intuitive. I'm constantly learning new technologies to stay at the forefront of the ever-evolving web landscape.

projects.title: 04 / Selected Works
projects.heading: Projects
projects.desc: A collection of digital products focused on performance, accessibility, and high-end aesthetics.
